bridge-type.label: DD-WRT Network
bridge-type.description: A network of DD-WRT compatible devices managed via SSH

parameter.name: hostnames
parameter.label: Hostnames
parameter.description: Optional comma separated list of hostnames or IP addresses of the devices for discovery

parameter.name: user
parameter.label: User
parameter.description: Default username to access the devices

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Password
parameter.description: Optional default password to access the devices. To use keys instead of password place the keys in $USER_DATA/ddwrt/keys

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Interval the devices are polled in seconds

thing-type.label: DD-WRT Device
thing-type.description: A DD-WRT, OpenWrt, or compatible Linux device managed via SSH

parameter-group.name: authentication
parameter-group.label: Authentication
parameter-group.description: Authentication settings. To use keys instead of password place the keys in $USER_DATA/ddwrt/keys

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the device

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Interval the device is polled in seconds

thing-type.label: Wireless Radio
thing-type.description: A wireless radio interface on a DD-WRT device

parameter.name: interfaceId
parameter.label: Interface ID
parameter.description: Wireless interface identifier (e.g. wl0, ath0, wlan0)

parameter.name: parentDeviceMac
parameter.label: Parent Device MAC
parameter.description: MAC address of the parent device

thing-type.label: Wireless Client
thing-type.description: A wireless client associated with a DD-WRT network device

parameter.name: mac
parameter.label: MAC Address
parameter.description: MAC address of the wireless client

thing-type.label: Firewall Rule
thing-type.description: A GUI-configured firewall filter rule from nvram

channel-type.label: Online
channel-type.description: Whether the device or client is currently online

channel-type.label: Uptime
channel-type.description: System up since, in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss format

channel-type.label: Total Clients
channel-type.description: Total number of clients connected across all devices

channel-type.label: Wireless Clients
channel-type.description: Number of wireless clients connected across all devices

channel-type.label: Wired Clients
channel-type.description: Number of wired clients connected across all devices

channel-type.label: CPU Load
channel-type.description: 1-minute load average

channel-type.label: CPU Temperature
channel-type.description: CPU temperature in degrees Celsius

channel-type.label: WAN IP
channel-type.description: External WAN IP address (only available on gateway devices)

channel-type.label: WAN In
channel-type.description: Total bytes received on the WAN interface (only available on gateway devices)

channel-type.label: WAN Out
channel-type.description: Total bytes sent on the WAN interface (only available on gateway devices)

channel-type.label: LAN In
channel-type.description: Total bytes received on the LAN bridge interface (br0)

channel-type.label: LAN Out
channel-type.description: Total bytes sent on the LAN bridge interface (br0)

channel-type.label: Reboot
channel-type.description: Turn ON to reboot the device; automatically resets to OFF

channel-type.label: Enabled
channel-type.description: Whether the radio or rule is enabled

channel-type.label: SSID
channel-type.description: Wireless network name

channel-type.label: Channel
channel-type.description: Wireless channel number

channel-type.label: Mode
channel-type.description: Wireless mode (e.g. Master, Client, Ad-Hoc)

channel-type.label: Client Count
channel-type.description: Number of clients associated with this radio

channel-type.label: MAC Address
channel-type.description: MAC address of the wireless client

channel-type.label: Hostname
channel-type.description: Hostname of the wireless client

channel-type.label: IP Address
channel-type.description: IP address of the wireless client

channel-type.label: Access Point
channel-type.description: MAC address of the access point the client is associated with

channel-type.label: Signal-to-Noise Ratio
channel-type.description: Signal-to-noise ratio in dB

channel-type.label: RX Rate
channel-type.description: Receive rate in Mbit/s

channel-type.label: TX Rate
channel-type.description: Transmit rate in Mbit/s

channel-type.label: Last Seen
channel-type.description: Timestamp when the client was last seen online

channel-type.label: Description
channel-type.description: Description of the firewall rule
